title: ForgePlan State
description: Ephemeral session state for ForgePlan. Tracks active node, build progress, and hook control flags. Located at .forgeplan/state.json

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last state write

active_node.description: Currently active node for building. Null when no build is in progress.

status.description: What operation is in progress. review-fixing is a transient status used during multi-agent review cycles when a fixer agent is writing code to address review findings. sweeping is used during sweep/deep-build fix cycles.

agent_status.description: Structured agent status. WORKING=in progress, DONE=complete, DONE_WITH_CONCERNS=complete with caveats, NEEDS_CONTEXT=missing info, BLOCKED=cannot proceed. Agents must set this instead of free-text status claims.

nodes.description: Per-node state tracking. Keys are node IDs.

status.description: Current node status (reviewing/review-fixing/revising are transient in-progress states)

last_build_completed.description: ISO timestamp of when the last build completed. Used by /next to determine if a node has been rebuilt after a revision.

previous_status.description: Status before the current transient operation (building/reviewing/revising). Used by recovery SKIP to restore the correct state. Set by build/review/revise commands before changing status. Cleared on successful completion of the operation.

bounce_count.description: Number of times Stop hook has bounced this node back. Escalates to user at >= 3.

bounce_exhausted.description: Set by deep-build when Stop hook bounce limit is reached. Indicates the node was marked built without full AC verification. Unmet ACs are added as sweep findings.

unverified_acs.description: List of acceptance criteria IDs that were not verified when bounce_exhausted is true. Populated by deep-build, consumed by sweep.

pre_build_files.description: Snapshot of files in the node's file_scope directory at build start. Used by PostToolUse to distinguish new files from pre-existing ones. Set by /forgeplan:build setup.

files_created.description: Files created via Write tool during build (safe to delete on reset). Auto-populated by PostToolUse.

files_modified.description: Pre-existing files modified (via Edit) or overwritten (via Write) during build. NOT safe to delete on reset — need manual revert. Auto-populated by PostToolUse.

last_review.description: Path to most recent native review report, or null

last_crossmodel_review.description: Path to most recent cross-model review report, or null. Only set when BYOK cross-model review is configured in config.yaml.

spec_type.description: Cached spec type for quick access without reading spec YAML

revision_history.description: History of revisions to this node

shared_types_created_by.description: Node ID that first created src/shared/types/index.ts. Used by recovery to determine shared types ownership.

stop_hook_active.description: Prevents infinite loops in Stop hook evaluation

wiki_last_compiled.description: Timestamp of last compile-wiki.js run. Used for staleness detection. Optional — not in required array for backward compat.

wiki_compiling.description: True while compile-wiki.js is running. If true at SessionStart, previous compile was interrupted.

wiki_compile_attempts.description: Consecutive failed compile-wiki.js runs. Resets on success. Skips compilation after 3.

sweep_state.description: Tracks autonomous sweep/deep-build operations. Null when no sweep is active.

current_phase.description: Current phase of the sweep/deep-build cycle. build-all is deep-build only (existing pipeline, next-node.js should still return recommendations). verify-runnable is the Phase A compilation/test/server gate. runtime-verify is the Phase B behavioral testing gate (Sprint 8). claude-sweep onward is the autonomous sweep loop. halted means max_passes reached without convergence.

current_model.description: Which model is currently active (claude, codex, gemini, gpt)

fixing_node.description: Node ID currently being fixed, or null if in analysis/cross-check phase

halted_from_phase.description: When current_phase is 'halted', this records the phase before halting so recovery knows where to resume from

phase_advancement.description: Checkpoint data for deep-build phase advancement. Used to resume or abort safely if the run crashes after cross-phase integration but before promoted spec generation completes.

agent_convergence.description: Per-agent convergence tracking. Keys are agent names (e.g., 'sweep-adversary', 'sweep-contractualist', 'sweep-skeptic'). Agents with status 'converged' are not re-dispatched.

findings_history.description: Finding count per pass for anti-oscillation detection

consecutive_failures.description: Consecutive failed dispatch count — force-converge after 3

needs_manual_attention.description: Findings from force-converged agents that need manual review

failed_agents.description: Agents that returned unstructured responses — re-dispatched on next pass

blocked_decisions.description: Category C findings requiring architectural decisions from the user

id.description: Finding ID. Claude findings: F1, F2... Cross-model findings: X1, X2...

file.description: File path where the issue was found

confidence.description: Confidence score 0-100. Findings below 75 are filtered before the fix cycle.

build_phase_started_at.description: When the current build_phase was entered. Used for staleness warning (>7 days without advancement). Set when build_phase changes.
